zh.lifeSummary: 當Eilika von Oldenburg於大約1126年出生時，她的父親Elimar II Count of Oldenburg57歲，母親Eilika von Werl-Riedberg24歲。她和Heinrich I. Graf von Tecklenburg至少有1個兒子。她去世於1189年2月28日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇格拉福沙福特 特可倫波格享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Oldenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Fritz, Otto, Claus, Hans, Jurgen, Ruediger.

North German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Oldenburg, the capital of the former principality of the same name, from the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of Middle Low German ald, old ‘old’ + burg ‘fortress, fortified town’.

en.lifeSummary: When Eilika von Oldenburg was born about 1126, her father, Elimar II Count of Oldenburg, was 57 and her mother, Eilika von Werl-Riedberg, was 24. She had at least 1 son with Heinrich I. Graf von Tecklenburg. She died on 28 February 1189, in Tecklenburg, Holy Roman Empire, at the age of 64.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Heinrich I. Graf von Tecklenburg. Elle est décédée le 28 février 1189, à Grafschaft Tecklenburg, Saint-Empire romain, à l’âge de 64 ans.

ko.Tecklenburg, Westphalia, Prussia, German: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 테클렌버그
ko.lifeSummary: Eilika von Oldenburg(이)가 대략 1126년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Elimar II Count of Oldenburg(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eilika von Werl-Riedberg(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Heinrich I. Graf von Tecklenburg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1189년 2월 28일 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 그라프샤프트 테클렌버그에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Heinrich I. Graf von Tecklenburg. Она умерла 28 февраля 1189 г. в местности графщафт теккленбург, хилигесь рoмищесь раич в возрасте 64 лет.
